title: Old Timer Having Another Eva Revival
display_title: Old Timer Having Another Eva Revival
wikitext:
[]: Old Timer Having Another Eva Revival             Quote Post by MCE » Mon Jun 06, 2011 9:19 pm So was looking through boxes in the garage for my birth certificate and I stumbled across some lost treasures... Several A5 movie posters and my holy grail of Eva merchandise [see last pic]! What a surprise as I thought I sold this stuff years ago! Now I'm off to watch the series + movies again... Death and Rebirth Laminated copy EoE Laminated copy Revival of Evangelion Laminated only Intact, near mint tickets to each movie! Cheers!

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Jun 06, 2011 9:32 pm Nice collection!

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Mon Jun 06, 2011 9:34 pm Man, that's quite a treasure trove!! How much did all that cost you?? I remember reading about how there were talks to get EoE theatrical screenings internationally. It's a crying shame they fell through.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Mon Jun 06, 2011 9:35 pm Amazing, really amazing. :) Even the tickets!

[]:             Quote Post by MCE » Mon Jun 06, 2011 9:36 pm Thanks! Also have mint B2 size nfs posters maybe will get pics tomorrow... Btw, you should have seen my collection back in the day... Almost disturbing... I probably miss the complete [as of 2002] soundtrack collection which were all first press and/or limited edition... Got killed on Ebay on those... How much did all that cost you??

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Fri Jun 10, 2011 3:40 am Ha! I did not even keep my tickets of Death & Rebirth or EoE.... Only a copy of the Red Cross Book stayed with me... Did you get them all by buying secondhand?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jun 10, 2011 9:05 pm Amazing, amazing, collection! Kinda makes me hope I could somehow see Eva:Final/4.0 in Japan (if that somehow happens, I'm certainly keeping the ticket). I'd love to have a copy of the EoE LCL Sea poster but 1) it would creep me out every-time I look at it (the mini-poster of Mangle's EoE with the LD coverart of Asuka, Shinji, & GNR is bad enough!) 2) Only bootlegs are sold of that nowadays unless you're loaded with cash. Be sure to treasure those!

[]:             Quote Post by shinji_ryoji_89 » Sat Jun 11, 2011 3:04 pm Sweet! What are the descriptionsin some of them all about? Don't worry, I don't need a full translation just a general idea of what they say : p Also, is the third ticket for Revival of Evangelion? Are all Japanese movie tickets like that? I ask too many questions.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jun 11, 2011 3:53 pm I noticed OP is selling these on Ebay, for whatever it's worth: http://cgi.ebay.com/Rare-Evangelion-Movie-Posters-1997-1998-/120735038974?pt=LH_DefaultDomain_0&hash=item1c1c5e7dfe#ht_500wt_1121 (Personally I wouldn't be able to part with something like that, but passing it on to those who really want it is always good too.)

[]: Advance Ticket             Quote Post by symbv » Sat Jun 11, 2011 9:15 pm shinji_ryoji_89 wrote: Also, is the third ticket for Revival of Evangelion? Are all Japanese movie tickets like that?
